case_title: JOHN FLUKER VS. SUSANA R AQUINO

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLUKER, JOHN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JOHN FLUKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ERRONEOUSLY FILED THIS ACTION IN SAN FRANCISCO WHICH IS NOT THE PROPER VENUE FOR THIS CLAIM. PLAINTIFF RESIDES IN OAKLAND AND DEFENDANT RESIDES IN SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $875.00 FILED BY FLUKER, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT AQUINO, SUSANA R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED FEB-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AQUINO, SUSANA R
